summary: iter263 Admin Console + Chronos Deep-Dive + Theme Toggle + Sidebar Changes - E2E Testing Complete

minor.issue: Returns degraded response due to LLM budget exhaustion (expected behavior, graceful degradation working correctly)

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar module registry warnings are dev-safe (not regressions) - modules like admin-console, chronos, etc. show '[Sidebar] Module X not in registry, allowing (dev-safe)' which is expected behavior

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 passed, 3 transient 502 errors on Chronos endpoints - retested manually and all pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: iter263 introduced Admin Console with 8 tabs (pulse, users, updates, installers, it, audit, flags, support). All backend endpoints working. Theme toggle persists via localStorage 'echo-theme-mode'. ADMINISTRATION sidebar group visible only for admin/owner roles. Pastry banner role-gated to pastry-chef, executive-chef, sous-chef only.

backend_tests.admin_console_pulse: PASS - Returns uptime_human, active_users_15m, total_users, admin_users, recent_errors_24h, collections_top, panels_loaded_today, version, environment
backend_tests.admin_console_integrations: PASS - Returns items[] with emergent-llm, mongodb, firebase-fcm, twilio, aws-s3, email, stripe
backend_tests.admin_console_updates: PASS - Returns current_version, latest_version, channel, update_available, changelog[], rollout
backend_tests.admin_console_installers: PASS - Returns pwa, desktop[] (macOS/Windows/Linux), mobile[] (iOS/Android), mdm
backend_tests.admin_console_flag_toggle: PASS - PUT chronos.v2 {enabled:false} returns enabled:false, toggle back works
backend_tests.admin_console_tech_support_create: PASS - POST {subject, body, severity} creates ticket
backend_tests.chronos_deep_dive: PASS - Returns 200 with degraded:true (LLM budget exhausted, graceful degradation working)

frontend_tests.admin_console_8_tabs: PASS - All 8 tabs present (pulse, users, updates, installers, it, audit, flags, support)
frontend_tests.admin_console_tab_navigation: PASS - Clicking each tab shows its panel content
frontend_tests.feature_flag_toggle: PASS - chronos.v2 flag toggles ENABLED ↔ DISABLED
frontend_tests.theme_toggle_functionality: PASS - HTML class toggles between theme-dark and theme-light
frontend_tests.theme_persistence: PASS - localStorage 'echo-theme-mode' persists after page reload
frontend_tests.sidebar_administration_group: PASS - ADMINISTRATION group visible at top for admin role
frontend_tests.sidebar_administration_role_gating: PASS - Code review confirms director role does NOT have 'administration' in allowed groups
frontend_tests.hamburger_menu_removed: PASS - No hamburger button at top-left on desktop
frontend_tests.pastry_banner_role_gating: PASS - Code review confirms only pastry-chef, executive-chef, sous-chef see banner (admin excluded)

mocked_apis_note: admin_console.tech_support._forward_to_aurion returns {delivered:false} until AURION_SUPPORT_URL + AURION_SUPPORT_TOKEN env vars are set. Desktop installer download URLs are placeholders. Chronos deep-dive returns degraded markdown due to Emergent LLM Key budget exhaustion.
